manual_review.reason: ret from ext4_ext_insert_extent is checked at fast_commit.c:1784 and then jumps to out, where ext4_fc_replay_add_range returns 0 at line 1834; cleanup is present but the error value is swallowed.
manual_review.notes: Replay semantics should be checked before treating this as a confirmed bug.

cleanup_calls: ext4_error(sb, "orphan file block %d: bad magic", i)
static_reason: error path exits while resource acquired before error path has no matching release in cleanup.

ownership_transfer_hints.reason: resource appears in a call before the error path

exception_hints.reason: resource appears in a call before the error path

manual_review.reason: After ext4_bread stores the current block in oi->of_binfo[i].ob_bh at orphan.c:600, a bad magic check at line 610 jumps to out_free; the out_free loop starts with i-- and releases only prior blocks, leaving the current ob_bh unreleased.
manual_review.notes: Corrupt orphan block magic should exercise this path.

score_explanation: E2 API protocol support with exception hints +10
buffer_head or memory protocol violation with exception hints +3

protocol_evidence.description: buffer_head acquired by read/getblk helpers should be released by brelse unless ownership escapes

manual_review.notes: Corrupt orphan block checksum should exercise this path.

是否存在资源所有权转移给子函数？
是否存在封装函数隐含释放？
该候选应判为 true_candidate、false_positive 还是 uncertain？请给出代码行证据。
协议证据中的资源获取在该错误路径前是否确定成功？
协议要求的 release action 是否已经在所有退出路径上执行？
资源是否由当前模型未覆盖的 cleanup wrapper 释放？
资源所有权是否转移给其他函数或持久结构？
这条静态协议义务是否因路径语义不适用？
如果候选为真，应补充哪一个具体缺失动作？
最合适的运行时验证方式是什么：ENOSPC、EIO、ENOMEM、quota failure 还是 journal failure？
列出的 wrapper 是否真的释放了 required resource？
ownership transfer hint 是真实转移还是保守静态猜测？
如果 ownership 已转移，谁负责后续 cleanup？
如果 wrapper cleanup 存在，它在这条错误路径上是否可达？
该候选是否应因协议 exception 成立而降级？
还需要补充什么静态 summary 才能精确判断？
如果已有 review feedback label，它的证据来源和结论是否仍然成立？
review feedback 结论是否应沉淀为 wrapper summary、ownership pattern 或 scoring 调整？
